flandersqmd 0.0.5
  • Reference
  • Changelog

    • Code of conduct

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

flandersqmd 0.0.5

  • Fix inbo_website().

flandersqmd 0.0.4

  • Use citeme instead of checklist for citation management.

flandersqmd 0.0.3

  • Create Docker for rendering the examples.
  • Fix DOI in colophon only report.
  • Add DOI.
  • Update instructions in README.

flandersqmd 0.0.2

  • create_report() doesn’t open an empty project (#2).
  • create_report() sets a better output directory (#3).
  • Replace shortname with reportname in create_report().

flandersqmd 0.0.1

  • Add create_report().
  • Add insert_missing_metadata().
  • Add add_cover().

flandersqmd 0.0.0

  • Added a NEWS.md file to track changes to the package.
  • Add checklist infrastructure.

On this page

Developed by Thierry Onkelinx, .

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
